data.title: Shoushimin Series
data.synopsis:
Jougorou Kobato has a habit of inserting himself into other people's problems. After realizing his detective skills are neither wanted nor appreciated, he makes an agreement with his shy friend Yuki Osanai to become ordinary together. Now entering high school, they aim to be perceived as regular people, yet Kobato cannot help but fall back into his deductive ways when faced with everyday mysteries.

Unfortunately, mundane occurrences are not all the duo stumbles across. As they go through their school days trying to avoid drawing attention to themselves, Kobato and Osanai at times get caught up in incidents that put their plan of a peaceful, average life at risk.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Shoushimin Series aired on TV Asahi's NUMAnimation block. The series was released on Blu-ray in three volumes from October 30, 2024, to December 27, 2024.

data.title: Kamitsubaki-shi Kensetsuchuu.
data.synopsis:
Seven years after humanity was devastated by a major disaster, a beacon of science and prosperity rises in Kamitsubaki City. But lurking in its shadows are Tesseractor, monsters born from human darkness. Only the Witchling, five girls with voices that wield magic, stand against them. With every note, they fight, not just to protect the peace of the city, but to heal a broken world.

(Source: Crunchyroll)

titles.title: The Mirage House in the Clouds

data.title: Yun Zhongju San Zi
data.title_english: The Mirage House in the Clouds
data.synopsis:
In an ancient world where gods, demons, and mortals coexisted, the immortal Chang'er and his apprentice Xiao Liang lived in seclusion in the Floating Light Cave. Their peaceful life was shattered by the pursuing demon king Dapeng. The timid Xiao Liang was forced to team up with the clever and cunning scholar Jiang Cheng and the resolute and stubborn monk Chongming, embarking on a journey to find the legendary immortal's abode, Cloud Dwelling. Along the way, the three would face numerous hardships, experience heart-fluttering romance, and endure trials of friendship and life-or-death situations. Meanwhile, a grand conspiracy involving forces from all three realms was unfolding around them.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
